problem id: 679af1e1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(6)

examples:
  00011111 -> 11000000
  00000010 -> 10000000
  11010110 -> 10000001
  01011110 -> 10000001
  11001111 -> 11000011
  11111101 -> 01000011
  10011101 -> 01000010
  10011010 -> 10000010

query: 01101111
predicted answer: 11000001
